title: Even and Odd Components of Signals
summary: This page contains problems related to even and odd components of signals, including determining even/odd decompositions, sketching transformed signals, and proving energy relationships. Problems cover topics such as energy of even/odd components, orthogonality of even and odd parts, and signal transformations involving time scaling and shifting.

figures.caption: A piecewise-linear signal y(t) that rises linearly from 0 to 1 over the interval 0 ≤ t ≤ 1, remains at 1 for 1 ≤ t ≤ 2, and is zero elsewhere.
